prompt: Where on screen does the main HUD bar live?
rationale: anchor_min=[0,1] anchor_max=[1,1] pivot=[0.5,1] — top-anchored full-width stretch. Replaces prior bottom-strip baseline.

prompt: How tall should the HUD bar be?
resolution: Tall enough to fit two stacked icon-buttons in the right zone plus padding
rationale: size_delta.y=144 (fits 2×64 icon buttons + 4+4 padding + spacing 4 = 140; headroom 4). Rebake-3 fix — initial 80 caused right-zone overflow.

prompt: How should the HUD bar be divided internally?
resolution: Three zones: left (file ops), center (city readouts), right (game controls)
rationale: layout=hstack with named zones left/center/right. Left=new/save/load, Center=city-name+sim-date+population, Right=4-column game controls cluster.

prompt: What buttons live in the left zone?
resolution: New game, Save game, Load game — three illuminated buttons
rationale: instance_slugs: hud-bar-new-button / hud-bar-save-button / hud-bar-load-button. Actions: action.game-new / action.game-save / action.game-load.

prompt: What information shows in the center zone?
resolution: City name, current sim date, population — stacked vertically
rationale: center zone=vstack. city-name-label (kind=label, bind=cityStats.cityName), sim-date-readout (kind=readout, bind=timeManager.currentDate), population-readout (kind=readout, bind=cityStats.population).

prompt: How should the right zone controls be arranged?
resolution: Four columns: col-0 zoom cluster, col-1 budget+time stack, col-2 stats, col-3 auto, col-4 map
rationale: right zone=hstack of 4-5 cols. col=0: zoom-in/out (vstack 2 rows). col=1: budget-button (row 0) + play-pause+speed-cycle row (row 1). col=2: stats (rowSpan=2). col=3: auto (rowSpan=2). col=4: map (rowSpan=2). Needed nested layout walker — Bug B root cause.

prompt: How should the speed controls work?
resolution: Two buttons: play/pause toggle + speed cycle (1×→2×→4× label)
rationale: Replaces prior 5-button cluster (pause + speed-1..4). hud-bar-play-pause-button (bind_state=timeManager.isPaused, icon swap) + hud-bar-speed-cycle-button (label_bind=timeManager.currentTimeSpeedLabel). Bug I root cause = adapter still had 5-button array.

prompt: How should the budget button work?
resolution: Readout-button showing total budget + delta, opens budget panel on click

prompt: Which buttons use icons vs text labels?
resolution: Most use icons; AUTO, SPEED-CYCLE use text labels; MAP and STATS use icons
rationale: icon-based: zoom-in/out/budget/play-pause/stats/map. Caption-fallback: AUTO (label=AUTO, no icon authored yet), speed-cycle (label_bind=currentTimeSpeedLabel). This drove Bug D (slug switch) + Bug F (caption spawn). icon=empty = intentional caption-only.

prompt: How should spacing and padding work in the HUD bar?
resolution: gap_px=8 between zones, padding top/bottom 4px left/right 8px
rationale: padding_json={top:4,left:8,right:8,bottom:4}. gap_px=8. Icon buttons 64×64. Rebake-1 fix: ContentSizeFitter PreferredSize on Col/Row containers needed.

prompt: What visual theme should the HUD bar use?
resolution: Illuminated-button archetype throughout — cream body, tan border, indigo icon
rationale: All children use illuminated-button archetype. color.bg.cream + color.border.tan + color.icon.indigo. Dark surface on root panel (rebake-1 fix: root image color = ui-surface-dark 0.196,0.196,0.196,1 not white).

prompt: How should the HUD bar handle the DB-first bake architecture?
resolution: All children seeded via panel_child rows in DB; bake pipeline reads DB, never hand-authors prefab children
rationale: schema_v4 migration 0108_seed_hud_bar_panel_v2. 14 panel_child rows. rect_json seeded in migration 0109_panel_detail_rect_json (rebake-6: DB authority over panel root sizing). snapshot exporter emits rect_json field. UiBakeHandler.ApplyPanelRectJsonOverlay overlays DB rect over C# kind defaults.

prompt: Which existing controllers must survive the rebake?
resolution: HudBarDataAdapter, MiniMapController, SpeedButtonsController, TimeManager, CityStats, EconomyManager, IlluminatedButton, UiAssetCatalog — all preserved
rationale: Behavior-freeze rules 1-4. Slug-walk owns slot binding; speed mutation single-path; geography-init gate non-bypass; caption-text fallback survives. Any rebake violating these = revert + re-diagnose.

prompt: What layer / z-order does the HUD bar occupy?
resolution: z.hud (10) — always visible, below modals and toasts
rationale: z.hud=10. Below z.modal=30 and z.toast=20. tooltip z-layer = z.tooltip (above modals). HUD never obscured by sim world (z.world=0).
